flashcards.question: Shield Volcano
flashcards.answer: A broad, gently sloping volcano built by fluid basaltic lava flows (e.g., Mauna Loa)

flashcards.question: Composite Volcano
flashcards.answer: A tall, steep volcano with alternating lava and ash layers; capable of explosive eruptions

flashcards.question: Hot Spot
flashcards.answer: A stationary zone of intense heat in the mantle that creates volcanoes independent of plate boundaries

flashcards.question: Magma
flashcards.answer: Molten rock beneath Earth's surface; called lava when it reaches the surface

flashcards.question: Viscosity
flashcards.answer: A measure of a fluid's resistance to flow; high-viscosity magma produces more explosive eruptions
